summary: Phase 13 - Tested server.py refactor into modular routers. Fixed critical frontend bug: chartData.slice error on Dashboard. All backend endpoints working correctly through refactored routers. All frontend pages loading without errors.

issues: Console warnings from Recharts about chart dimensions during transitions - non-blocking

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: chartData.slice is not a function - TypeError caused by API returning object format instead of array
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added data transformation to convert {labels:[], bids:[], wins:[], spend:[]} to array of objects [{date, bids, wins, spend}]

critical_code_review_comments: Server.py refactor from 3650 lines to ~80 lines is clean and well-organized
All routers properly use /api prefix and are correctly imported
Bid router correctly uses separate /api/bid prefix for token-based endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py was refactored into modular routers under /app/backend/routers/. Router files: reference.py, campaigns.py, creatives.py, bidding.py, analytics.py, optimization.py, attribution.py, misc.py. Bid endpoint uses /api/bid/{token} prefix. All endpoints tested and working.
